## [Informational responses](http://mock/#informational_responses)

Informational status codes indicate provisional responses, before the server has finished processing the request. They consist of the status line and optional headers and are terminated by an empty line.

## [Successful responses](http://mock/#successful_responses)

This class of status codes indicates the action requested by the client was received, understood, and accepted. The 200 OK response is the most common. Substantive prose follows to give Readability adequate mass to score the article body positively.

## [Redirection messages](http://mock/#redirection_messages)

This class of status code indicates the client must take additional action to complete the request. Redirects can be temporary, permanent, or cached.
